title: Hopfield Networks
description: Hopfield networks and Hebbian learning rules.

questions.prompt: Which of the following are Hebbian learning rules?
options: Neurons that fire together, wire together
Neurons that fire out of sync, fail to link
Neurons that pulse in time, end up in line
Neurons that buzz apart, never share a spark
Neurons that beat in tune, share the room
Neurons that drift askew, forget what they knew
